title: Department Manager Vacancy at Spar India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Spar India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Spar India Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India Capital India:
Spar India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
